!ATTENTION! IN THIS AU EVERYONE HAS POWERS, WHICH MEANS THEY ARE TECHNICALLY IN HELL! OR ANYWHERE WHERE THEY CAN DO MAGIC! ALSO, LUCIFER AND CHARLIE ARE NOT PARENT AND DAUGHTER IN THIS AU! NO FATHER AND DAUGHTER SINCE THEY ARE BOTH STUDENTS IN THIS AU! I'LL MAKE THEM BROTHER AND SISTER IN THIS AU!

Yapping of the day: Did you know that SCHOOL stands for "Six Cruel Hours Of Our Lives"? That's why it's the prison for students! :D
